items.title: Terra Innovatum Signs Commercial LOI with Waiken ILW for Deployment of SOLO™ Microreactors at DIRECTV Latin America Data Center Facilities
items.blurb: Initial deployment of up to 8 MWe designed to support DIRECTV Latin America broadcasting data centers in Argentina and Brazil

items.title: Korean researchers secure ABS approval for molten salt SMR-Powered Containership design
items.blurb: SEOUL : South Korea has taken a significant step towards the development of nuclear-powered commercial shipping, with a 15,000 TEU containership design

items.title: Clean Core Thorium Energy and Quadrant Nuclear Industries Sign MoU on Domestic HALEU Supply
items.blurb: Companies will evaluate long-term domestic HALEU supply arrangements to support commercialization of advanced thorium-based nuclear fuel.
